name: Super Pawn
description_short: Super Pawn is a pawn shop located in Brooklyn, NY offering collateral-based loans on personal items. Operating since at least the current period with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Super Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 1258 Broadway in the Williamsburg section of Brooklyn, New York. The business provides collateral-based lending services, a common alternative financial service for consumers who need quick access to cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. Pawn shops have operated in consumer finance for centuries as a straightforward lending model where customers pledge personal property as security for loans.

Based on available information, Super Pawn offers the core pawn shop services including accepting personal items as collateral in exchange for cash loans. The business maintains regular operating hours with extended availability on weekdays (10:00 AM to 7:00 PM Monday through Thursday) and reduced weekend hours (10:00 AM to 5:00 PM Friday through Sunday). The company can be reached at (718) 919-2200 for inquiries about loan terms, accepted items, or other services.

What distinguishes Super Pawn is its location in a densely populated Brooklyn neighborhood and its weekday accessibility with evening hours until 7:00 PM. This extended schedule accommodates working consumers who may need to visit during non-traditional business hours. The business appears to be an established operation serving the local community.

As a pawn shop, Super Pawn serves consumers in immediate financial need who have personal property available as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical items and typically carry significant interest rates. Borrowers who cannot retrieve their items lose ownership of the collateral. This is fundamentally a short-term emergency lending solution rather than a credit-building product, and interest costs can be substantial compared to traditional lending.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 7:00 PM accommodate working professionals
Located in accessible Brooklyn neighborhood on Broadway
No credit check required for collateral-based loans
Immediate cash access without lengthy approval processes
Direct phone line available for customer inquiries
Weekend hours available for Saturday and Sunday transactions
Established local business with verifiable contact information
cons: Loss of personal property if loan cannot be repaid or redeemed
Typically high interest rates compared to traditional lending products
Limited information available about specific loan terms and rates
Collateral-based model restricts who can borrow to those with valuable items
Short-term solution that does not build credit history
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and valuable personal collateral
Individuals without access to traditional credit or banking services
People needing temporary liquidity without credit evaluation
Those who need cash on the same day without application delays
diagnosis: Super Pawn is best for Brooklyn residents facing immediate financial emergencies who own valuable personal property they can pledge as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term solutions with the risk of permanent loss of items, and should only be used when no other credit options are available.
services: Cash loans against jewelry and valuable items
Pawn ticket issuance and loan documentation
Item redemption and loan repayment services
